timeline_events.title: SHIFT AI Contest Manipulation - Kill Shot Evidence
timeline_events.description: AvZHExxq2 purchases 2.29M SHIFT 13 MINUTES BEFORE 'winner' announcement. No voting contract existed. Winner pre-selected unilaterally. F1eSPc1 + 7ACsEkYS execute synchronized buys at 00:16:05 UTC (same second).

timeline_events.evidence: Blockchain timestamps: Buy at 00:13 UTC, Announcement at 00:26 UTC. 13-minute pre-positioning impossible if contest legitimate.
timeline_events.kill_shot: No voting contract existed during 'contest' period
